title: store/order/updated
description:
Fires when a previously-created order is updated.  

Changes to the following fields trigger this event: 
* Status
* Coupon Code
* Billing and Shipping Address
* Product Type
* Search Keywords
* Related Products
* Warranty Information
* Page Title
* Meta Description
* Gift Wrapping options
* Bin Picking Number (BPN)
* Fixed Shipping Price
* Free Shipping
* Open Graph Sharing Type
* Availability Text
* Purchasability
* Release Date
* Remove pre-order status on this date

```json filename="Example callback object" showLineNumbers
{
  "created_at": 1561482670,
  "store_id": "1025646",
  "producer": "stores/{store_hash}",
  "scope": "store/order/updated",
  "hash": "352e4afc6dd3fc85ea26bfdf3f91852604d57528",
  "data": {
    "type": "order",
    "id": 250
  }
}
```

allOf.description: A lightweight description of the event that triggered the webhook. Will vary depending on the event registered.

data.description: A lightweight description of the event that triggered the webhook. Will vary depending on the event registered.
